trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has multiple request body parameters, one of which is a Stream. When the Stream is a parameter, there can be no other parameters in the body.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has multiple request body parameters, one of which is a Stream. When the Stream is a parameter, there can be no other parameters in the body.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies multiple request body parameters to be serialized without any wrapper elements. At most one body parameter can be serialized without wrapper elements. Either remove the extra body parameters or set the BodyStyle property on the WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute to Wrapped.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies multiple request body parameters to be serialized without any wrapper elements. At most one body parameter can be serialized without wrapper elements. Either remove the extra body parameters or set the BodyStyle property on the WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute to Wrapped.

trans-unit.source: Bind parameters cannot be null or empty for path variable '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Bind parameters cannot be null or empty for path variable '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: This buffer cannot be returned to the buffer manager because it is the wrong size.
trans-unit.target: This buffer cannot be returned to the buffer manager because it is the wrong size.

trans-unit.source: The size quota for this stream ({0}) has been exceeded.
trans-unit.target: The size quota for this stream ({0}) has been exceeded.

trans-unit.source: Unable to deserialize XML body with root name '{0}' and root namespace '{1}' (for operation '{2}' and contract ('{3}', '{4}')) using {5}. Ensure that the type corresponding to the XML is added to the known types collection of the service.
trans-unit.target: Unable to deserialize XML body with root name '{0}' and root namespace '{1}' (for operation '{2}' and contract ('{3}', '{4}')) using {5}. Ensure that the type corresponding to the XML is added to the known types collection of the service.

trans-unit.source: Type '{0}' of operation '{1}' and contract ('{2}', '{3}') could not be serialized. Ensure that the type can be serialized using {4} and add the type to the known types collection of the service if required.
trans-unit.target: Type '{0}' of operation '{1}' and contract ('{2}', '{3}') could not be serialized. Ensure that the type can be serialized using {4} and add the type to the known types collection of the service if required.

trans-unit.source: Certificate-based client authentication is not supported in TransportCredentialOnly security mode. Select the Transport security mode.
trans-unit.target: Certificate-based client authentication is not supported in TransportCredentialOnly security mode. Select the Transport security mode.

trans-unit.source: Conditional retrieval (If-Modified-Since, If-None-Match) is only supported for HTTP GET and HEAD requests.
trans-unit.target: Conditional retrieval (If-Modified-Since, If-None-Match) is only supported for HTTP GET and HEAD requests.

trans-unit.source: Conditional update (If-Match, If-Unmodified-Since) is only supported for HTTP PUT, POST, and DELETE requests.
trans-unit.target: Conditional update (If-Match, If-Unmodified-Since) is only supported for HTTP PUT, POST, and DELETE requests.

trans-unit.source: {0} is not a valid encoding string for System.Text.Encoding.GetEncoding(string).
trans-unit.target: {0} is not a valid encoding string for System.Text.Encoding.GetEncoding(string).

trans-unit.source: Cross domain javascript callback is not supported in authenticated services.
trans-unit.target: Cross domain javascript callback is not supported in authenticated services.

trans-unit.source: CrossDomainScriptAccessEnabled cannot be used in Clients.
trans-unit.target: CrossDomainScriptAccessEnabled cannot be used in Clients.

trans-unit.source: WebContentFormat.Default cannot be set on a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty; use Xml, Json, or Raw instead.
trans-unit.target: WebContentFormat.Default cannot be set on a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty; use Xml, Json, or Raw instead.

trans-unit.source: A registration already exists for URI '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: A registration already exists for URI '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Cannot process contentType.
trans-unit.target: Cannot process contentType.

trans-unit.source: The envelope version of the outgoing message ({0}) does not match the envelope version of the encoder ({1}).
trans-unit.target: The envelope version of the outgoing message ({0}) does not match the envelope version of the encoder ({1}).

trans-unit.source: Unrecognized charSet '{0}' in contentType.
trans-unit.target: Unrecognized charSet '{0}' in contentType.

trans-unit.source: The ServiceEndpoint's Address is null. Address must be an absolute uri.
trans-unit.target: The ServiceEndpoint's Address is null. Address must be an absolute uri.

trans-unit.source: The WebContentTypeMapper threw an exception while attempting to map the content type. See the inner exception for details.
trans-unit.target: The WebContentTypeMapper threw an exception while attempting to map the content type. See the inner exception for details.

trans-unit.source: This message formatter cannot be used to process response messages.
trans-unit.target: This message formatter cannot be used to process response messages.

trans-unit.source: This message formatter cannot be used to process request messages.
trans-unit.target: This message formatter cannot be used to process request messages.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses GET, but also has body parameter '{2}'. GET operations cannot have a body. Either make the parameter '{2}' a UriTemplate parameter, or switch from WebGetAttribute to WebInvokeAttribute.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses GET, but also has body parameter '{2}'. GET operations cannot have a body. Either make the parameter '{2}' a UriTemplate parameter, or switch from WebGetAttribute to WebInvokeAttribute.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses GET, but also has a parameter of MessageContract type '{2}'. GET operations cannot have a body. To use a MessageContract parameter type, switch from WebGetAttribute to WebInvokeAttribute.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses GET, but also has a parameter of MessageContract type '{2}'. GET operations cannot have a body. To use a MessageContract parameter type, switch from WebGetAttribute to WebInvokeAttribute.

trans-unit.source: Endpoint not found.
trans-unit.target: Endpoint not found.

trans-unit.source: Endpoint not found. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service.
trans-unit.target: Endpoint not found. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service.

trans-unit.source: BODY { color: #000000; background-color: white; font-family: Verdana; margin-left: 0px; margin-top: 0px; } #content { margin-left: 30px; font-size: .70em; padding-bottom: 2em; } A:link { color: #336699; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } A:visited { color: #6699cc; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } A:active { color: #336699; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } .heading1 { background-color: #003366; border-bottom: #336699 6px solid; color: #ffffff; font-family: Tahoma; font-size: 26px; font-weight: normal;margin: 0em 0em 10px -20px; padding-bottom: 8px; padding-left: 30px;padding-top: 16px;} pre { font-size:small; background-color: #e5e5cc; padding: 5px; font-family: Courier New; margin-top: 0px; border: 1px #f0f0e0 solid; white-space: pre-wrap; white-space: -pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; } table { border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; font-family: Verdana;} table th { border-right: 2px white solid; border-bottom: 2px white solid; font-weight: bold; background-color: #cecf9c;} table td { border-right: 2px white solid; border-bottom: 2px white solid; background-color: #e5e5cc;}
trans-unit.target: BODY { color: #000000; background-color: white; font-family: Verdana; margin-left: 0px; margin-top: 0px; } #content { margin-left: 30px; font-size: .70em; padding-bottom: 2em; } A:link { color: #336699; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } A:visited { color: #6699cc; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } A:active { color: #336699; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } .heading1 { background-color: #003366; border-bottom: #336699 6px solid; color: #ffffff; font-family: Tahoma; font-size: 26px; font-weight: normal;margin: 0em 0em 10px -20px; padding-bottom: 8px; padding-left: 30px;padding-top: 16px;} pre { font-size:small; background-color: #e5e5cc; padding: 5px; font-family: Courier New; margin-top: 0px; border: 1px #f0f0e0 solid; white-space: pre-wrap; white-space: -pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; } table { border-collapse: collapse; border-spacing: 0px; font-family: Verdana;} table th { border-right: 2px white solid; border-bottom: 2px white solid; font-weight: bold; background-color: #cecf9c;} table td { border-right: 2px white solid; border-bottom: 2px white solid; background-color: #e5e5cc;}

trans-unit.source: Method not allowed.
trans-unit.target: Method not allowed.

trans-unit.source: Method not allowed. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service.
trans-unit.target: Method not allowed. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service.

trans-unit.source: There is no operation listening for {0}, but there is an operation listening for {1}, so you are being redirected there.
trans-unit.target: There is no operation listening for {0}, but there is an operation listening for {1}, so you are being redirected there.

trans-unit.source: Request Error
trans-unit.target: Request Error

trans-unit.source: Service
trans-unit.target: Service

trans-unit.source: The server encountered an error processing the request. See server logs for more details.
trans-unit.target: The server encountered an error processing the request. See server logs for more details.

trans-unit.source: The server encountered an error processing the request. The exception message is '{0}'. See server logs for more details. The exception stack trace is:
trans-unit.target: The server encountered an error processing the request. The exception message is '{0}'. See server logs for more details. The exception stack trace is:

trans-unit.source: The server encountered an error processing the request. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service. The exception message is '{1}'. See server logs for more details. The exception stack trace is:
trans-unit.target: The server encountered an error processing the request. Please see the service help page for constructing valid requests to the service. The exception message is '{1}'. See server logs for more details. The exception stack trace is:

trans-unit.source: <p>The server encountered an error processing the request. Please see the <a rel="help-page" href="{0}">service help page</a> for constructing valid requests to the service.</p>
trans-unit.target: <p>The server encountered an error processing the request. Please see the <a rel="help-page" href="{0}">service help page</a> for constructing valid requests to the service.</p>

trans-unit.source: ClientCredentialType '{0}' can only be used on the server side, not the client side. Please use one of the following values instead 'None, Basic, Client, Digest, Ntlm, Windows'.
trans-unit.target: ClientCredentialType '{0}' can only be used on the server side, not the client side. Please use one of the following values instead 'None, Basic, Client, Digest, Ntlm, Windows'.

trans-unit.source: HTTP context property '{0}' is missing from the incoming message. This typically means the message did not arrive over the WebHttpBinding transport.
trans-unit.target: HTTP context property '{0}' is missing from the incoming message. This typically means the message did not arrive over the WebHttpBinding transport.

trans-unit.source: A message was dispatched to the UnhandledDispatchOperation, but was invoked without a Message as input. This error might be caused by a behavior that provided a bad IDispatchMessageFormatter for the EndpointDispatcher's DispatchRuntime's UnhandledDispatchOperation's Formatter.
trans-unit.target: A message was dispatched to the UnhandledDispatchOperation, but was invoked without a Message as input. This error might be caused by a behavior that provided a bad IDispatchMessageFormatter for the EndpointDispatcher's DispatchRuntime's UnhandledDispatchOperation's Formatter.

trans-unit.source: Incoming message for operation '{0}' (contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') contains an unrecognized http body format value '{3}'. The expected body format value is '{4}'. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.
trans-unit.target: Incoming message for operation '{0}' (contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') contains an unrecognized http body format value '{3}'. The expected body format value is '{4}'. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.

trans-unit.source: Incoming message for operation '{0}' contains an unrecognized http body format value '{1}'. The expected body format value is '{2}'. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.
trans-unit.target: Incoming message for operation '{0}' contains an unrecognized http body format value '{1}'. The expected body format value is '{2}'. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a MessageContract parameter (of type '{2}') without a wrapper name and with more than one body element. MessageContract parameters without a wrapper element are supported only if they have zero or one body element.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a MessageContract parameter (of type '{2}') without a wrapper name and with more than one body element. MessageContract parameters without a wrapper element are supported only if they have zero or one body element.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses a MessageContract that has SOAP headers. SOAP headers are not supported by the None MessageVersion.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses a MessageContract that has SOAP headers. SOAP headers are not supported by the None MessageVersion.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' (in contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') specifies the http body format to be JSON but the serialization mechanism for the operation is not DataContract. JSON format is only supported with DataContract serialization. If you have an XmlSerializerFormatAttribute on the operation consider replacing it with DataContractFormatAttribute.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' (in contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') specifies the http body format to be JSON but the serialization mechanism for the operation is not DataContract. JSON format is only supported with DataContract serialization. If you have an XmlSerializerFormatAttribute on the operation consider replacing it with DataContractFormatAttribute.

trans-unit.source: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find an attribute with name 'type' and value 'null'. Found value '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find an attribute with name 'type' and value 'null'. Found value '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find an attribute with name 'type' and value 'object'. Found value '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find an attribute with name 'type' and value 'object'. Found value '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: WebMessageEncodingBindingElement only supports MessageVersion.None.
trans-unit.target: WebMessageEncodingBindingElement only supports MessageVersion.None.

trans-unit.source: The value must be in the range [{0}, {1}].
trans-unit.target: The value must be in the range [{0}, {1}].

trans-unit.source: Cannot claim lock within the allotted timeout of {0}. The time allotted to this operation may have been a portion of a longer timeout.
trans-unit.target: Cannot claim lock within the allotted timeout of {0}. The time allotted to this operation may have been a portion of a longer timeout.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies MessageContract type '{2}' which has IsWrapped as false but has multiple request body parameters. At most one body parameter can be serialized without wrapper elements. Either remove the extra body parameters or set the IsWrapped property on the MessageContractAttribute to true.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies MessageContract type '{2}' which has IsWrapped as false but has multiple request body parameters. At most one body parameter can be serialized without wrapper elements. Either remove the extra body parameters or set the IsWrapped property on the MessageContractAttribute to true.

trans-unit.source: In the endpoint at '{0}', in order to use '{1}', the '{2}' of the binding must have ManualAddressing set to true.
trans-unit.target: In the endpoint at '{0}', in order to use '{1}', the '{2}' of the binding must have ManualAddressing set to true.

trans-unit.source: The maximum message size quota for incoming messages ({0}) has been exceeded. To increase the quota, use the MaxReceivedMessageSize property on the appropriate binding element.
trans-unit.target: The maximum message size quota for incoming messages ({0}) has been exceeded. To increase the quota, use the MaxReceivedMessageSize property on the appropriate binding element.

trans-unit.source: The maximum message size quota for outgoing messages ({0}) has been exceeded.
trans-unit.target: The maximum message size quota for outgoing messages ({0}) has been exceeded.

trans-unit.source: The message body is a Stream and cannot be re-read.
trans-unit.target: The message body is a Stream and cannot be re-read.

trans-unit.source: The message body is missing or empty.
trans-unit.target: The message body is missing or empty.

trans-unit.source: The XmlReader used to read the message body is in an invalid read state '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: The XmlReader used to read the message body is in an invalid read state '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The MessageBuffer has been closed and can no longer be used.
trans-unit.target: The MessageBuffer has been closed and can no longer be used.

trans-unit.source: The message has been closed and can no longer be used.
trans-unit.target: The message has been closed and can no longer be used.

trans-unit.source: Incoming message for operation '{0}' (contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') does not contain a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper or a WebMessageEncodingBindingElement has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper and WebMessageEncodingBindingElement for more details.
trans-unit.target: Incoming message for operation '{0}' (contract '{1}' with namespace '{2}') does not contain a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper or a WebMessageEncodingBindingElement has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper and WebMessageEncodingBindingElement for more details.

trans-unit.source: Message does not contain the http body format property. The encoder expects the http format property to be '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Message does not contain the http body format property. The encoder expects the http format property to be '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Incoming message does not contain a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper or a WebMessageEncodingBindingElement has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper and WebMessageEncodingBindingElement for more details.
trans-unit.target: Incoming message does not contain a WebBodyFormatMessageProperty. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper or a WebMessageEncodingBindingElement has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper and WebMessageEncodingBindingElement for more details.

trans-unit.source: The text encoding '{0}' used in the text message format is not supported.
trans-unit.target: The text encoding '{0}' used in the text message format is not supported.

trans-unit.source: Unknown MessageVersion.
trans-unit.target: Unknown MessageVersion.

trans-unit.source: In contract '{0}', there are multiple operations with Method '{2}' and a UriTemplate that is equivalent to '{1}'. Each operation requires a unique combination of UriTemplate and Method to unambiguously dispatch messages. Use WebGetAttribute or WebInvokeAttribute to alter the UriTemplate and Method values of an operation.
trans-unit.target: In contract '{0}', there are multiple operations with Method '{2}' and a UriTemplate that is equivalent to '{1}'. Each operation requires a unique combination of UriTemplate and Method to unambiguously dispatch messages. Use WebGetAttribute or WebInvokeAttribute to alter the UriTemplate and Method values of an operation.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has both WebGetAttribute and WebInvokeAttribute; only one can be present.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has both WebGetAttribute and WebInvokeAttribute; only one can be present.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a Stream return value and also has out or ref parameters. When Stream is the return value of the operation, it cannot have ref or out parameters.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a Stream return value and also has out or ref parameters. When Stream is the return value of the operation, it cannot have ref or out parameters.

trans-unit.source: Parameter '{0}' of operation '{1}' in contract '{2}' is a Stream, and is also a ref or out parameter. Stream cannot be a ref or out parameter.
trans-unit.target: Parameter '{0}' of operation '{1}' in contract '{2}' is a Stream, and is also a ref or out parameter. Stream cannot be a ref or out parameter.

trans-unit.source: The {0} object has been disposed.
trans-unit.target: The {0} object has been disposed.

trans-unit.source: Object is read-only.
trans-unit.target: Object is read-only.

trans-unit.source: WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute supports setting the BodyStyle property to Bare only with DataContract and XmlSerializer serializable types. Operation '{0}' does not specify serialization using any of these formats. Add a DataContractFormatAttribute or XmlSerializerFormatAttribute to this operation to specify one of these serialization formats.
trans-unit.target: WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute supports setting the BodyStyle property to Bare only with DataContract and XmlSerializer serializable types. Operation '{0}' does not specify serialization using any of these formats. Add a DataContractFormatAttribute or XmlSerializerFormatAttribute to this operation to specify one of these serialization formats.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies at least one response body parameter that is not a return value of the operation. Only the return value is allowed when the BodyStyle property of WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute is set to Bare. Either remove the extra response body parameters or set the BodyStyle property to Wrapped.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' of contract '{1}' specifies at least one response body parameter that is not a return value of the operation. Only the return value is allowed when the BodyStyle property of WebGetAttribute/WebInvokeAttribute is set to Bare. Either remove the extra response body parameters or set the BodyStyle property to Wrapped.

trans-unit.source: The operation '{0}' does not support '{1}' as a response format.
trans-unit.target: The operation '{0}' does not support '{1}' as a response format.

trans-unit.source: Could not find operation name in the message properties.
trans-unit.target: Could not find operation name in the message properties.

trans-unit.source: This operation is supported only when the operation selector is of type '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: This operation is supported only when the operation selector is of type '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: Parameter type '{0}' of operation '{1}' (contract '{2}' with namespace '{3}') is not of type Stream. Ensure that the parameter is of type Stream or derives from Stream.
trans-unit.target: Parameter type '{0}' of operation '{1}' (contract '{2}' with namespace '{3}') is not of type Stream. Ensure that the parameter is of type Stream or derives from Stream.

trans-unit.source: This operation formatter can only be used for deserializing requests; serializing replies is not supported since query strings are not used to represent parameters in replies.
trans-unit.target: This operation formatter can only be used for deserializing requests; serializing replies is not supported since query strings are not used to represent parameters in replies.

trans-unit.source: Read is not supported on this stream.
trans-unit.target: Read is not supported on this stream.

trans-unit.source: The channel received an unexpected fault input message while closing. The fault reason given is: '{0}'
trans-unit.target: The channel received an unexpected fault input message while closing. The fault reason given is: '{0}'

trans-unit.source: The channel received an unexpected fault input message with Action = '{0}' while closing. You should only close your channel when you are not expecting any more input messages.
trans-unit.target: The channel received an unexpected fault input message with Action = '{0}' while closing. You should only close your channel when you are not expecting any more input messages.

trans-unit.source: The channel received an unexpected input message with Action '{0}' while closing. You should only close your channel when you are not expecting any more input messages.
trans-unit.target: The channel received an unexpected input message with Action '{0}' while closing. You should only close your channel when you are not expecting any more input messages.

trans-unit.source: ReplyAlreadySent
trans-unit.target: ReplyAlreadySent

trans-unit.source: The requestContext has been aborted.
trans-unit.target: The requestContext has been aborted.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}', belonging to contract ('{1}', '{2}') has an XmlSerializerFormatAttribute configured with OperationUse Encoded or OperationStyle Rpc. OperationUse Encoded and OperationStyle Rpc are not supported for web bindings. Configure the endpoint with a SOAP binding (like WSHttpBinding) in order to use these options.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}', belonging to contract ('{1}', '{2}') has an XmlSerializerFormatAttribute configured with OperationUse Encoded or OperationStyle Rpc. OperationUse Encoded and OperationStyle Rpc are not supported for web bindings. Configure the endpoint with a SOAP binding (like WSHttpBinding) in order to use these options.

trans-unit.source: IAsyncResult not provided or of wrong type.
trans-unit.target: IAsyncResult not provided or of wrong type.

trans-unit.source: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find node type 'Element' with name '{0}' and namespace '{1}'. Found node type '{2}' with name '{3}' and namespace '{4}'
trans-unit.target: OperationFormatter encountered an invalid Message body. Expected to find node type 'Element' with name '{0}' and namespace '{1}'. Found node type '{2}' with name '{3}' and namespace '{4}'

trans-unit.source: There was an error while trying to deserialize parameter {0}:{1}. Please see InnerException for more details.
trans-unit.target: There was an error while trying to deserialize parameter {0}:{1}. Please see InnerException for more details.

trans-unit.source: There was an error while trying to deserialize parameter {0}:{1}. The InnerException message was '{2}'. Please see InnerException for more details.
trans-unit.target: There was an error while trying to deserialize parameter {0}:{1}. The InnerException message was '{2}'. Please see InnerException for more details.

trans-unit.source: There was an error while trying to serialize parameter {0}:{1}. The InnerException message was '{2}'. Please see InnerException for more details.
trans-unit.target: There was an error while trying to serialize parameter {0}:{1}. The InnerException message was '{2}'. Please see InnerException for more details.

trans-unit.source: Seek is not supported on this stream.
trans-unit.target: Seek is not supported on this stream.

trans-unit.source: The formatter '{0}' does not support serializing replies.
trans-unit.target: The formatter '{0}' does not support serializing replies.

trans-unit.source: The formatter '{0}' does not support serializing requests.
trans-unit.target: The formatter '{0}' does not support serializing requests.

trans-unit.source: Unable to find the endpoint behavior WebHttpBehavior for endpoint address '{0}'. This is possibly caused by not calling ServiceModelWebServiceCollectionExtensions.AddServiceModelWebServices(IServiceCollection services).
trans-unit.target: Unable to find the endpoint behavior WebHttpBehavior for endpoint address '{0}'. This is possibly caused by not calling ServiceModelWebServiceCollectionExtensions.AddServiceModelWebServices(IServiceCollection services).

trans-unit.source: '{0}' does not allow the use of Streams with the MessageContract programming model. The service '{1}' defines an operation '{2}' that uses the MessageContract type '{3}'. '{3}' contains MessageBodyMember '{4}' of type Stream.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' does not allow the use of Streams with the MessageContract programming model. The service '{1}' defines an operation '{2}' that uses the MessageContract type '{3}'. '{3}' contains MessageBodyMember '{4}' of type Stream.

trans-unit.source: The task timed out after {0}. The time allotted to this operation may have been a portion of a longer timeout.
trans-unit.target: The task timed out after {0}. The time allotted to this operation may have been a portion of a longer timeout.

trans-unit.source: Argument {0} must be a non-negative timeout value. Provided value was {1}.
trans-unit.target: Argument {0} must be a non-negative timeout value. Provided value was {1}.

trans-unit.source: Argument {0} must be a positive timeout value. Provided value was {1}.
trans-unit.target: Argument {0} must be a positive timeout value. Provided value was {1}.

trans-unit.source: Cannot serialize parameter of type '{0}' (for operation '{1}', contract '{2}') because it is not the exact type '{3}' in the method signature and is not in the known types collection. In order to serialize the parameter, add the type to the known types collection for the operation using ServiceKnownTypeAttribute.
trans-unit.target: Cannot serialize parameter of type '{0}' (for operation '{1}', contract '{2}') because it is not the exact type '{3}' in the method signature and is not in the known types collection. In order to serialize the parameter, add the type to the known types collection for the operation using ServiceKnownTypeAttribute.

trans-unit.source: Type '{0}' is not supported by '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: Type '{0}' is not supported by '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: The additional default value with key '{0}' is invalid because the UriTemplate '{1}' does not contain a variable with that name.
trans-unit.target: The additional default value with key '{0}' is invalid because the UriTemplate '{1}' does not contain a variable with that name.

trans-unit.source: The base address must be an absolute URI with a scheme of http or https and no query or fragment.
trans-unit.target: The base address must be an absolute URI with a scheme of http or https and no query or fragment.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate.BindByName was called with an empty key in the parameters collection.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate.BindByName was called with an empty key in the parameters collection.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has no variables; UriTemplate.BindByPosition cannot be called with {1} value(s).
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has no variables; UriTemplate.BindByPosition cannot be called with {1} value(s).

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has {1} path variable(s) and {2} query variable(s) but was passed {3} value(s).
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has {1} path variable(s) and {2} query variable(s) but was passed {3} value(s).

trans-unit.source: The key '{0}' appears as both a literal segment and as a name in the name-value collection passed to UriTemplate.BindByName.
trans-unit.target: The key '{0}' appears as both a literal segment and as a name in the name-value collection passed to UriTemplate.BindByName.

trans-unit.source: Cannot look up compound segment results before a successful Match has been performed.
trans-unit.target: Cannot look up compound segment results before a successful Match has been performed.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has a compound path segment '{1}' that contains the variable '{2}' for which a default value was specified. Variables in compound segments cannot have default values.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has a compound path segment '{1}' that contains the variable '{2}' for which a default value was specified. Variables in compound segments cannot have default values.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for variable '{1}', but that variable appears inside a compound segment and cannot have a default value.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for variable '{1}', but that variable appears inside a compound segment and cannot have a default value.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query value variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. Query variables cannot have default values.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query value variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. Query variables cannot have default values.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for query variable '{1}'. Query variables cannot have default values.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for query variable '{1}'. Query variables cannot have default values.

trans-unit.source: The Defaults dictionary on the UriTemplate is immutable.
trans-unit.target: The Defaults dictionary on the UriTemplate is immutable.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' contains compound path segment '{1}' with two adjacent variables. Adjacent variables in compound segments are not supported.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' contains compound path segment '{1}' with two adjacent variables. Adjacent variables in compound segments are not supported.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. The default value of a path variable cannot be null, empty, or contain a path separator.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. The default value of a path variable cannot be null, empty, or contain a path separator.

trans-unit.source: The segment or query part '{0}' has an invalid format. Variable names must be enclosed in matching braces.
trans-unit.target: The segment or query part '{0}' has an invalid format. Variable names must be enclosed in matching braces.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has invalid variable declaration '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has invalid variable declaration '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has invalid usage of wildcard '{1}'. Wildcards are only allowed as the last path segment and cannot be combined with other characters in the same segment.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has invalid usage of wildcard '{1}'. Wildcards are only allowed as the last path segment and cannot be combined with other characters in the same segment.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for variable '{1}' that is null. Nullable defaults are only allowed when declared inline in the template.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has an additional default value for variable '{1}' that is null. Nullable defaults are only allowed when declared inline in the template.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}' but that variable is followed by variable '{2}' which is not nullable. All path variables after a nullable variable must also be nullable.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}' but that variable is followed by variable '{2}' which is not nullable. All path variables after a nullable variable must also be nullable.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}' but that variable is followed by literal segment '{2}'. Path variables with nullable defaults cannot be followed by literal segments.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}' but that variable is followed by literal segment '{2}'. Path variables with nullable defaults cannot be followed by literal segments.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}'. Path variables with nullable defaults cannot be followed by a wildcard segment.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has nullable default for variable '{1}'. Path variables with nullable defaults cannot be followed by a wildcard segment.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses UriTemplate parameters, but also uses a Message parameter. Message and UriTemplate parameters are incompatible.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses UriTemplate parameters, but also uses a Message parameter. Message and UriTemplate parameters are incompatible.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses UriTemplate parameters, but also uses a MessageContract parameter. MessageContract and UriTemplate parameters are incompatible.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' uses UriTemplate parameters, but also uses a MessageContract parameter. MessageContract and UriTemplate parameters are incompatible.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query string that ends in '&'.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query string that ends in '&'.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query value that is a compound (mixed literal and variable) expression. Query values must be either pure literals or pure variables.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query value that is a compound (mixed literal and variable) expression. Query values must be either pure literals or pure variables.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query parameter with an empty name.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query parameter with an empty name.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query parameter with a variable name. Query parameter names must be literals.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has a query parameter with a variable name. Query parameter names must be literals.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has multiple query parameters with the same name. Query parameter names must be unique within a template.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has multiple query parameters with the same name. Query parameter names must be unique within a template.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has wildcard variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. Wildcard variables cannot have default values.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has wildcard variable '{1}' with default value '{2}'. Wildcard variables cannot have default values.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has additional default value for wildcard variable '{1}'. Wildcard variables cannot have default values.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has additional default value for wildcard variable '{1}'. Wildcard variables cannot have default values.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplateTable contains templates with ambiguous query strings. Conflicting templates: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplateTable contains templates with ambiguous query strings. Conflicting templates: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The base address of the UriTemplateTable must be an absolute URI.
trans-unit.target: The base address of the UriTemplateTable must be an absolute URI.

trans-unit.source: The UriTemplateTable's BaseAddress must be set before this operation can be performed.
trans-unit.target: The UriTemplateTable's BaseAddress must be set before this operation can be performed.

trans-unit.source: The BaseAddress of the UriTemplateTable cannot be changed after the table has been made read-only.
trans-unit.target: The BaseAddress of the UriTemplateTable cannot be changed after the table has been made read-only.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplateTable contains duplicate templates: '{0}' and '{1}'.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplateTable contains duplicate templates: '{0}' and '{1}'.

trans-unit.source: The KeyValuePairs collection of the UriTemplateTable cannot be empty.
trans-unit.target: The KeyValuePairs collection of the UriTemplateTable cannot be empty.

trans-unit.source: '{0}' is not a valid UriTemplate string for use as a key in a UriTemplateTable.
trans-unit.target: '{0}' is not a valid UriTemplate string for use as a key in a UriTemplateTable.

trans-unit.source: The URI matched multiple UriTemplates in this UriTemplateTable. Use Match() instead of MatchSingle() to get all results.
trans-unit.target: The URI matched multiple UriTemplates in this UriTemplateTable. Use Match() instead of MatchSingle() to get all results.

trans-unit.source: The base address of the UriTemplateTable must be an absolute URI.
trans-unit.target: The base address of the UriTemplateTable must be an absolute URI.

trans-unit.source: A UriTemplate key in the UriTemplateTable's KeyValuePairs collection cannot be null.
trans-unit.target: A UriTemplate key in the UriTemplateTable's KeyValuePairs collection cannot be null.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplateTable contains templates with ambiguous query strings: '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplateTable contains templates with ambiguous query strings: '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: UriTemplate '{0}' has multiple variables with the name '{1}'. Variable names must be unique within a template.
trans-unit.target: UriTemplate '{0}' has multiple variables with the name '{1}'. Variable names must be unique within a template.

trans-unit.source: Unknown WebContentFormat '{0}'.
trans-unit.target: Unknown WebContentFormat '{0}'.

trans-unit.source: The incoming message has an unexpected message format '{0}'. The expected message formats for the operation are {1}. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.
trans-unit.target: The incoming message has an unexpected message format '{0}'. The expected message formats for the operation are {1}. This can be because a WebContentTypeMapper has not been configured on the binding. See the documentation of WebContentTypeMapper for more details.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a UriTemplate that expects a parameter named '{2}', but there is no input parameter with that name on the operation.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a UriTemplate that expects a parameter named '{2}', but there is no input parameter with that name on the operation.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a path variable named '{2}' which does not have type 'string'. Variables for UriTemplate path segments must have type 'string'.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a path variable named '{2}' which does not have type 'string'. Variables for UriTemplate path segments must have type 'string'.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a query variable named '{2}' of type '{3}', but type '{3}' is not convertible by '{4}'. Variables for UriTemplate query values must have types that can be converted by '{4}'.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has a query variable named '{2}' of type '{3}', but type '{3}' is not convertible by '{4}'. Variables for UriTemplate query values must have types that can be converted by '{4}'.

trans-unit.source: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has multiple parameters named '{2}' that vary only in uppercase versus lowercase. The parameter names must be distinct.
trans-unit.target: Operation '{0}' in contract '{1}' has multiple parameters named '{2}' that vary only in uppercase versus lowercase. The parameter names must be distinct.

trans-unit.source: The value supplied must be non-negative.
trans-unit.target: The value supplied must be non-negative.

trans-unit.source: The value supplied must be greater than zero.
trans-unit.target: The value supplied must be greater than zero.

trans-unit.source: The endpoint at '{0}' does not have a Binding with the None MessageVersion. '{1}' is only intended for use with WebHttpBinding or similar bindings.
trans-unit.target: The endpoint at '{0}' does not have a Binding with the None MessageVersion. '{1}' is only intended for use with WebHttpBinding or similar bindings.

trans-unit.source: The endpoint at '{0}' does not have a Binding with Scheme 'http' or 'https'. '{1}' is only intended for use with WebHttpBinding or similar bindings.
trans-unit.target: The endpoint at '{0}' does not have a Binding with Scheme 'http' or 'https'. '{1}' is only intended for use with WebHttpBinding or similar bindings.

trans-unit.source: Weak entity tags (W/"...") are not supported in this context.
trans-unit.target: Weak entity tags (W/"...") are not supported in this context.

trans-unit.source: The standard endpoint of type '{0}' does not have a behavior of type '{1}'. The endpoint is initialized with the proper behavior and it should not be removed or replaced.
trans-unit.target: The standard endpoint of type '{0}' does not have a behavior of type '{1}'. The endpoint is initialized with the proper behavior and it should not be removed or replaced.

trans-unit.source: WebBodyFormatMessageProperty(Format={0})
trans-unit.target: WebBodyFormatMessageProperty(Format={0})

trans-unit.source: The standard endpoint of type '{0}' does not have a binding of type '{1}'. The endpoint is initialized with the proper binding and it should not be removed or replaced.
trans-unit.target: The standard endpoint of type '{0}' does not have a binding of type '{1}'. The endpoint is initialized with the proper binding and it should not be removed or replaced.

trans-unit.source: Raw (application/octet-stream pass-through) content is not yet supported by the WebHttpBinding client. Use Xml or Json instead, or convert your payload to a typed parameter.
trans-unit.target: Raw (application/octet-stream pass-through) content is not yet supported by the WebHttpBinding client. Use Xml or Json instead, or convert your payload to a typed parameter.

trans-unit.source: WebHttpDispatchOperationSelector is server-side and is not supported in the client-only port of System.ServiceModel.Web. Construct a UriTemplate manually from the [WebGet]/[WebInvoke] attribute on your contract instead.
trans-unit.target: WebHttpDispatchOperationSelector is server-side and is not supported in the client-only port of System.ServiceModel.Web. Construct a UriTemplate manually from the [WebGet]/[WebInvoke] attribute on your contract instead.

trans-unit.source: The endpoint address '{0}' has message headers and is being used with a binding that's configured for message version None. Either change the endpoint address to not contain message headers or change the binding to be one that supports SOAP (for example, WSHttpBinding).
trans-unit.target: The endpoint address '{0}' has message headers and is being used with a binding that's configured for message version None. Either change the endpoint address to not contain message headers or change the binding to be one that supports SOAP (for example, WSHttpBinding).

trans-unit.source: The HTTP method '{0}' of the incoming request (with URI '{1}') is not allowed.
trans-unit.target: The HTTP method '{0}' of the incoming request (with URI '{1}') is not allowed.

trans-unit.source: The incoming HTTP request's URI '{0}' does not match any service operation.
trans-unit.target: The incoming HTTP request's URI '{0}' does not match any service operation.

trans-unit.source: The XmlBuffer's quota has been exceeded.
trans-unit.target: The XmlBuffer's quota has been exceeded.

trans-unit.source: New types cannot be registered with serializer manager after the service has been opened.
trans-unit.target: New types cannot be registered with serializer manager after the service has been opened.

trans-unit.source: The '{0}' method is not supported by the stream.
trans-unit.target: The '{0}' method is not supported by the stream.

trans-unit.source: The get accessor of the '{0}' property is not supported by the stream.
trans-unit.target: The get accessor of the '{0}' property is not supported by the stream.

trans-unit.source: The set accessor of the '{0}' property is not supported by the stream.
trans-unit.target: The set accessor of the '{0}' property is not supported by the stream.
